Linear.description: Connects to the Linear API. Allows interaction with issues, projects, and other Linear data.

sequentialthinking.description: Provides structured, step-by-step thinking tools. To start, run: npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-sequential-thinking

mcpServers.description: Enables browser automation and interaction. To start, run: npx @agentdeskai/browser-tools-server@1.2.0

time.description: Provides tools to get the current time and date. To start, run: python -m mcp_server_time

Notion.description: Connects to the Notion API. Allows interaction with pages, databases, and other Notion content.

Context7.description: Connects to the remote Context7 service for advanced context-aware capabilities. As a URL-based server, it does not need to be started locally.

mcp-sequentialthinking-tools.description: Provides advanced sequential thinking tools with persistent state. To start, run: npx -y mcp-sequentialthinking-tools
